Maggie Trowbridge

GRC Lead • Cyber Law • Security Analyst

I'm a cybersecurity student and aspiring cyber law professional passionate about governance, risk, compliance, and security policy. Currently pursuing my B.S. in Cyber Security with minors in Communications and Criminal Law at Indiana Institute of Technology, while working as a Security Analyst Apprentice and Research Assistant.
